languages.text: If an enemy affected by an {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} within 5 cells from the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} attacks the Operative or their ally, that enemy suffers +{uip|INT|d28f54bddb8d46f3b0a3ed239d985492} more exploits.
languages.original_text: If an enemy affected by an exploit within 5 cells from the operative attacks the Operative or their ally? that enemy suffers +{uip|INT|d28f54bddb8d46f3b0a3ed239d985492} additional exploits

traits.locale_text: If an enemy affected by a clue within 5 cells from the Adept attacks the Adept or their ally, that enemy is affected by an additional clue.

If an enemy affected by an {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} within 5 cells from the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} attacks the Operative or their ally, that enemy suffers +{uip|INT|d28f54bddb8d46f3b0a3ed239d985492} more exploits.

If an enemy affected by an {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} within 5 cells from the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} attacks the Operative or their ally, that enemy suffers +{uip|INT|d28f54bddb8d46f3b0a3ed239d985492} more exploits.

If an enemy affected by an {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} within 5 cells from the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} attacks the Operative or their ally, that enemy suffers +1 additional exploit.

languages.text: Если противник с уязвимостью в радиусе 5 клеток от {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}оперативника{/g} атакует самого оперативника или его союзника, то этот противник получает дополнительные {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}уязвимости{/g} ({uip|INT|d28f54bddb8d46f3b0a3ed239d985492}).
languages.original_text: If an enemy affected by an {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} within 5 cells from the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} attacks the Operative or their ally, that enemy suffers +{uip|INT|d28f54bddb8d46f3b0a3ed239d985492} more exploits.

traits.locale_text: Если противник с уязвимостью атакует адепта или его союзника в радиусе 5 клеток от адепта, то этот противник получает еще 1 уязвимость.
Если противник с уязвимостью атакует адепта или его союзника в радиусе 5 клеток от адепта, то этот противник получает еще 1 уязвимость.

languages.text: 受到{g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}研究{/g}效果影响的敌人攻击{g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}特工{/g}或其盟友时，若该名敌人在特工周围5格范围内，则该名敌人额外受到{uip|INT|d28f54bddb8d46f3b0a3ed239d985492}层研究效果。

traits.locale_text: 受到{g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}研究{/g}效果影响的敌人攻击{g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}特工{/g}或其盟友时，若该名敌人在特工周围5格范围内，则该名敌人额外受到{uip|INT|d28f54bddb8d46f3b0a3ed239d985492}层研究效果。

languages.text: Si un enemigo afectado por una {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}vulnerabilidad{/g} situado en un radio de 5 casillas del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}agente{/g} ataca al agente o a uno de sus aliados, el enemigo sufre +{uip|INT|d28f54bddb8d46f3b0a3ed239d985492} vulnerabilidades más.
